content.text: Good — `Option<Str>` without `#[default]` matches the existing pattern (`default: Option<Value>` at line 258). The code follows established conventions in the file. Now let's write the patch.

Implemented both features in `crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs`: `first()`/`last()` now accept an optional named `repeat` (default `1`, backward compatible) that extracts multiple consecutive grapheme clusters, and an optional named `strip` that trims matching characters from the respective end before extraction, falling back to the original "string is empty" error when everything is stripped. Patch written to `patch.txt`.

result: Implemented both features in `crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs`: `first()`/`last()` now accept an optional named `repeat` (default `1`, backward compatible) that extracts multiple consecutive grapheme clusters, and an optional named `strip` that trims matching characters from the respective end before extraction, falling back to the original "string is empty" error when everything is stripped. Patch written to `patch.txt`.
